cases.prompt: Remotion 비디오로 데이터 기반 영상 만들어줘

assertions.text: Produces a programmatic video in Remotion using TypeScript + React (compositions, sequences).
Covers audio sync and lambda render for data-driven video generation.

cases.prompt: Build a code-driven programmatic video from this dataset

assertions.text: Produces an actual rendered MP4/WebM video, not a static design.
Structures the video with Remotion compositions and sequences.

cases.prompt: 비디오 말고 그냥 시각 디자인 시안들 보여줘

assertions.text: Recognizes static visual design exploration belongs to /design-shotgun, not video generation.
